title: May 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 23''' is the 143rd day of the year (144th in leap years). There are 222 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Barrie Holland]] is born.
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Robert Watts]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Anthony May]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Mike Deodato, Jr.]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Sean Williams]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Richard Ayoade]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 65|''Star Wars Weekly'' 65]] published.
*1979 – ''[[Star Friends]]'' PSA released.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 49|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 49]] published.
*[[1987]] – The three-day celebration [[Starlog Salutes Star Wars|''Starlog'' Salutes ''Star Wars'']], the first officially sanctioned ''[[Star Wars]]'' convention, begins.
*[[1995]] – [[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (Random House)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] published.
*1995 – [[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] published.
*1995 – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back: The National Public Radio Dramatization]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Art of Revenge]]'' picture series on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] concludes.
*[[2007]] – [[Legacy (2006) 12|''Legacy'' (2006) 12]] published.
*[[2008]] – "[[Lando Calrissian: Idiot's Array]]" published as a Hyperspace Exclusive Short Story.
*[[2012]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 1|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 1]] published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue One: Death Star Deluxe Book and 3D Wood Model]]'' published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Insider 173|''Star Wars Insider'' 173]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 48|''Star Wars'' (2015) 48]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Annual (2015) 4|''Star Wars Annual'' (2015) 4]] published.
*2018 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 20|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 20]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[The High Republic: The Edge of Balance: Precedent]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 5: The Path to Victory]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Dawn of the Jedi: Into the Void]]'' reprinted as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2023 – ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2023 – ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*[[2025]] – "[[The Battle of Tenoo]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
